title: MARD Influence & Narrative Watch — Registry Methodology
purpose: Public-source observation of political amplification, foreign state communication, state media, FIMI infrastructure and maritime narratives.
safeguards: Inclusion is not an allegation of disinformation, extremism, automation or foreign coordination.
Narrative overlap is stored separately from evidence of coordination.
The 10-post/week and top-15-percent rules require a first 28-day observation window.
Official party, government, state-media and manually selected core sources remain eligible regardless of activity.
RT/RT DE and other sanctioned-source public exports are metadata-and-analysis only.

public_data_policy.public_outputs: Aggregated counts, methodology and later derived analytical clusters.
public_data_policy.sanctioned_source_handling: Metadata, hashes, counts, timing and original analysis only.
